name: LOCALIZA RENT A CAR ADR 1
summary: Localiza Rent a Car S.A. provides car rental services in Brazil and other Latin American countries. The company offers a fleet of vehicles for short-term and long-term rental, as well as fleet management services. TICKER: Localiza Rent a Car S.A. provides car rental services in Brazil and other Latin American countries, offering a fleet of vehicles for short-term and long-term rental and fleet management services.
